metadata.description: Public marketplace for the Whiteboard-Me plugin. Mirror of the whiteboard-me module from Sherpa OS.

plugins.name: whiteboard-me
plugins.description: Whiteboard-Me — research-grounded work-life map: a whiteboard-sketch infographic of who you are professionally today, rendered as crisp HTML/SVG (never a one-shot AI image). Deterministic ink-sketch portrait, business/entity mode, Instagram teaser variant.
